rows.title: DBS deploys AI-driven 'Alpha' squads to blend legal, compliance, risk roles
rows.author: Business Times: Renald Yeo
rows.summary: DBS is dismantling traditional silos with its new "Alpha" squads, integrating legal, compliance, and risk specialists into multidisciplinary units.
rows.text: DBS deploys AI squads full text...

rows.title: Rule of law and norms needed for successful social governance: Ong Ye Kung at China forum
rows.author: Straits Times: Joyce ZK Lim
rows.summary: At the recent Singapore-China Social Governance Forum, Minister Ong Ye Kung emphasized a strategic equilibrium between the rule of law and social norms.
rows.text: Rule of law article full text...

rows.title: Leadership key to helping young lawyers face challenges of AI, work pressures: Chief Justice
rows.author: Straits Times: Selina Lum
rows.summary: Chief Justice Menon is sounding the alarm on how GenAI and relentless billing targets threaten the next generation of lawyers.

rows.title: Why the best general counsels shape risk, not avoid it: Opinion
rows.author: Business Times: Jeffrey Tan
rows.summary: Forget the "chief no officer" stereotype; the modern General Counsel must evolve from a mere legal gatekeeper to a strategic risk shaper.

rows.title: Nickel scam: Jail for man who was Ng Yu Zhi's surety for bail despite not having enough cash, assets
rows.author: Straits Times: Shaffiq Alkhatib
rows.summary: In a stark warning against bail misconduct, Chua Eng Kiam was sentenced to two months' jail for misleading the court as a $1.5 million surety.

rows.title: Illegal weaponisation of Strait of Hormuz would set dangerous precedent: PM Wong
rows.author: Straits Times: Ng Wei Kai
rows.summary: Prime Minister Lawrence Wong is warning that the illegal weaponization of the Strait of Hormuz could trigger a dangerous domino effect for global maritime law.
rows.text: Strait of Hormuz article full text...

rows.title: Cybersecurity alert in S'pore as Claude-maker Anthropic tests new AI model
rows.author: Straits Times: Sarah Koh
rows.summary: The CSA has issued a high-alert advisory following news that Anthropic's "Claude Mythos" can autonomously exploit software flaws in hours rather than months.

rows.title: In-house Lawyers: Are You Getting the Best Work from Your External Law Firms?
rows.author: Law.com: Richard Martin
rows.summary: Are your external firms truly delivering their best work, or is high-pressure management undermining your legal security?

rows.title: Never mind the ozone layer, mind your dividends: Opinion
rows.author: Business Times: Jude Chan
rows.summary: Forget the ozone layer; focus on the bottom line. As carbon regulation shifts from a sustainability metric to a direct financial threat, heavy emitters face rising operational costs.

rows.title: AI deployment has 'stalled' for most Asia companies: report
rows.author: Business Times: Koh Kim Xuan
rows.summary: While AI interest is high across Asia, a new report highlights a critical "deployment gap," with only 1% of firms successfully embedding AI.

query.sql: select id, category, title, source_link, author, date, summary, text, imported_on from headlines order by date desc limit 11
